Dear Applicant

 

Thank you for attending the written examination for the position of Aerodrome Control Trainee on 6 May 2016.

 

Please be informed that our next stage of the recruitment process will be online Occupational Personality Questionnaire which will be scheduled in June 2017.  Invitation email will be sent out to those shortlistedcandidates latest by 9 June 2017. Candidates who do not receive the invitation email by 9 June 2017 may assume their applications unsuccessful.  The application and test paper will be kept for 12 months from the date of last interview / test attended and then destroyed afterwards.

有無人都收到?

Dear Applicant

 

Thank you for attending the written examination for the position of Aerodrome Control Trainee on 6 May 2016.

 

Please be informed that our next stage of the recruitment process will be online Occupational Personality Questionnaire which will be scheduled in June 2017.  Invitation email will be sent out to those shortlistedcandidates latest by 9 June 2017. Candidates who do not receive the invitation email by 9 June 2017 may assume their applications unsuccessful.  The application and test paper will be kept for 12 months from the date of last interview / test attended and then destroyed afterwards.
